sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 62:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 62:1
items.html: The connection of the two Heys, the first Hey and the bottom Hey, is called “the association of the quality of mercy with judgement,” since Bina is mercy and Malchut is judgement. (Inner Light, Item 6)
